message: 有结果了：16 帧 widened 这轮已经把“能不能扩面”这件事测清楚了。具体结论是，整条 chunked pipeline 已经可复跑地打通了，从冻结上游分块导出、reconstructed/teacher packet bundle、到 widened eval 都能落地；但 flat `16` 帧检索这条 claim 不成立，`reconstructed -> original` 只有 `0.0625` top-1，direct packet bridge 也只有 `0.0625`，delta-first packet retrieval 掉到 `0.0`。更关键的是，这不是完全没信号：我把四个小段拆开后，chunk00 和 chunk02 里 `pred_delta_to_target_feat_direct` 还能到 `0.5`，说明剩下的是局部 burst-level 正信号，而不是稳定的 clip-level flat signal。基于这组证据，我已经把当前线降级成“局部可行、暂不支持扩面 claim”，并把下一条更贴合证据的 child-line brief 固化成 `chunk-aware local-burst packet interface`；自动开新 idea branch 这一步被 runtime 的 anchor bug 挡住了，但下一轮已经可以直接按这份 brief 接着实现 chunk-aware bundle/evaluator。

guidance_vm.summary: Milestone recorded. Continue from the current anchor and keep the next checkpoint durable.
guidance_vm.why_now: Milestones should mark meaningful progress, not end the route prematurely.
complete_when: The next substantive output is written durably.

suggested_artifact_calls.name: artifact.interact(kind='progress', ...)
suggested_artifact_calls.purpose: Send the next checkpoint update across active surfaces.
